basic_info.headline: Member of Technical Staff at Anthropic
basic_info.about:
Personal Website: https://fuqichen1998.github.io/

- Master's in Robotics (MSR) at Carnegie Mellon University (May 2022)
- Bachelor's in Computer Science at the University of Michigan -Ann Arbor (May 2020)
- Bachelor's in Electrical & Computer Engineering at SJTU (August 2020)

Experience:
- 3 years in computer vision
- 4 years in machine learning
- 6 years in coding

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description:
Dense Voting for Active Object Detection
Supervised by Prof. Kris Kitani

Proposed a novel method for hand conditioned active object detection utilizing deep attention and pixel-wise majority voting
Evaluated performance on 100DOH and MECCANO, reached an mAP of 63.1 (outperformed the state-of-art by 10.5%)

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description:
Ego4D: A Massive First-Person Dataset and Challenge
Supervised by Prof. Kris Kitani

Built an interactive web interface with REST API to de-identify human face and license plate for over 800 hrs egocentric videos 
Lead the development of active object detection benchmark using DETR, CenterNet, CornerNet, and Faster-RCNN

experience.title: Instructional Aide
experience.description:
Instructional Aide for EECS 442: Computer Vision
Supervisor: Prof. Justin Johnson

experience.title: Undergraduate Researcher, Fessler research group
experience.description:
3D PET Reconstruction
Advisor: Prof. Jeffrey A. Fessler, Prof. Yuni Dewaraja

My specific tasks:
◦ Generated a 3D PET dataset consists of 100 samples utilizing MIRT in MATLAB from anonymous patient scans
◦Developed a novel method integrating back-projection and 3D U-Net for  PET reconstruction directly from measurements
◦ Evaluated the proposed model's performance in AR, CNR, RMSE, and compared with other deep learning baselines

experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant, Fouhey AI Lab(FAIL)
experience.description:
Cloud2GPS
Advisor: Prof. David Fouhey

My specific tasks:
◦ Extracted feature histograms (size, gradient, color in RGB and LAB spaces) from cloud images using OpenCV and filters
◦ Built a ResNet50 based classifier in Pytorch for clouds geographical location prediction, improving the mAP by 0.11 comparing to baselines of logistic regression and fully connected network
◦ Constructed an artificial object detection system for image filtering, reaching an accuracy of 95.06\% and AUC score of 0.92

experience.title: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant For VV255, UM-SJTU JI
experience.company: UM-SJTU Joint Institute, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
experience.description:
VV255 is an engineering course named Honored Applied Calculus III with over 150 students in the class this semester.
The specific Tasks of teaching assistant for this course:
1. Carry out tasks assigned by my instructor. Tasks include but not limited to: Lead weekly recitation class(s); Hold office hours; Grade homework / quizzes / exam(s); Get syllabus and 3 typical samples of report(s) / exam(s) copied and filed; Attend lecture(s) if required; Present as proctor in exams; Other tasks, such as regular meetings with faculty supervisor, answering emails, office work, etc.
2. Work as part of a teaching team that includes faculty, TAs and the Center for Learning and Teaching of the Joint Institute (CLT-JI) to support students in the learning process. Expected workload is 12 hours per week on average in general;
3. Participate in mandatory TA Training workshops offered by the CLT-JI on CANVAS, Lab Safety, Grading Issues & Exam Supervision. 
More details refer to the TA Handbook of UM-SJTU JI.

experience.title: Math Tutor, UM-SJTU JI
experience.company: UM-SJTU Joint Institute, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
